creator: pauls@utdallas.edu
text:
--On Wednesday, May 14, 2008 14:46:01 -0400 Thomas Abthorpe 
 <tabthorpe@freebsd.org> wrote:
 
 >
 >> Submitter-Id:	current-users
 >> Originator:	Thomas Abthorpe
 >> Organization:	FreeBSD.GoodKing.Ca
 >> Confidential:	no
 >> Synopsis:	[PATCH] security/bro: Add CONFLICTS
 >> Severity:	non-critical
 >> Priority:	low
 >> Category:	ports
 >> Class:		change-request
 >> Release:	FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE i386
 >> Environment:
 > System: FreeBSD 1006.x.rootbsd.net 7.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 7.0-RELEASE #0: Sun
 > Feb 24 19:59:52 UTC 2008
 >> Description:
 > -  Add CONFLICTS for sysutils/lbl-cf sysutils/lbl-hf
 >
 > Port maintainer (pauls@utdallas.edu) is cc'd.
 >
 > Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 >> How-To-Repeat:
 >> Fix:
 >
 > --- bro-1.2_1.patch begins here ---
 > Index: Makefile
 > ===================================================================
 > RCS file: /home/pcvs/ports/security/bro/Makefile,v
 > retrieving revision 1.34
 > diff -u -u -r1.34 Makefile
 > --- Makefile	17 Oct 2007 10:12:56 -0000	1.34
 > +++ Makefile	14 May 2008 18:43:58 -0000
 > @@ -15,6 +15,8 @@
 >  MAINTAINER=	pauls@utdallas.edu
 >  COMMENT=	System for detecting Network Intruders in real-time
 >
 > +CONFLICTS=	sysutils/lbl-cf-1.* sysutils/lbl-hf-1.*
 > +
 >  OPTIONS=	GPG "Support encrypted email" Off \
 >  		DOCS "Install documentation (not recommended)" Off
 >
 > --- bro-1.2_1.patch ends here ---
 >
 
 Approved.
 
 Please note: Kevin Lo stated that he would submit a new port for bro version 
 1.3.  The name would be bro-devel.  That port would replace the present 
 security/bro port when the software moves from devel to release and Kevin would 
 be the maintainer at that time.  (I'm ccing Kevin on this message.)
 
 -- 
 Paul Schmehl (pauls@utdallas.edu)
 Senior Information Security Analyst
 The University of Texas at Dallas
 http://www.utdallas.edu/ir/security/
